1C), which was prepared by re- acting gefitinib with the easily accessible Pd(0) Pharmaceutical diversification precursor [(tBuXPhos)Pd]2(COD) (26) at room temperature.
An extensive survey of ligands, solvents, and bases revealed tBuXPhos with the via palladium oxidative phosphazene base P2-Et (9 11) as the optimal ligand-base combination for this coupling (27).
